overview.zh: 今日HR焦点集中在AI对招聘与裁员的深层影响：Meta被26名员工起诉，指控AI裁员算法歧视休病假者，凸显AI决策可解释性难题。应届毕业生正与AI争夺入门岗位，多智能体AI招聘工具密集落地，同时NYC更新带薪病假法规。AI治理与合规已成为HR的核心战场。
overview.en: Today's HR focus centers on AI's deepening impact on hiring and layoffs: Meta faces a lawsuit from 26 employees alleging its AI layoff algorithm discriminated against those on medical leave, spotlighting the challenge of AI explainability. New graduates now compete with AI for entry-level roles, multi-agent AI recruiting tools are launching rapidly, and NYC has updated its paid sick leave rules. AI governance and compliance have become a core battleground for HR.

text.zh: 技术改变的是工具，而人才管理的本质永远是关于人的信任与成长。
text.en: Technology changes the tools, but the essence of talent management will always be about trust and human growth.

title.zh: Meta遭26名员工起诉：AI裁员算法涉嫌歧视休病假者
title.en: Meta Sued by 26 Employees: AI Layoff Algorithm Allegedly Targeted Those on Medical Leave

summary.zh: 26名前Meta员工提起集体诉讼，指控公司在裁员中使用的AI系统对正在休医疗假的员工存在系统性歧视。案件的核心难点在于：当AI做出裁员决定时，员工很难举证证明其中的偏见，这为AI辅助人事决策的合规性敲响警钟。
summary.en: Twenty-six former Meta employees filed a class action alleging the AI system used in layoffs systematically discriminated against staff on medical leave. The core challenge: when AI makes the firing decision, proving bias is extremely difficult, raising alarms about the compliance of AI-assisted personnel decisions.

title.zh: 应届毕业生须与AI争夺入门级岗位，招聘经理如是说
title.en: New Grads Have to Compete with AI for Entry-Level Roles, Hiring Managers Say

summary.zh: HR Dive报道显示，随着企业用AI承担大量基础性工作，传统上留给应届生的入门岗位正在被压缩。近三分之二的受访者认为AI正在减少入门级招聘，这迫使企业重新思考人才梯队培养与早期职业发展路径。
summary.en: HR Dive reports that as companies use AI to handle large volumes of foundational work, the entry-level roles traditionally reserved for new graduates are shrinking. Nearly two-thirds of surveyed workers believe AI is reducing entry-level hiring, forcing employers to rethink talent pipelines and early-career development.

title.zh: 多智能体AI招聘时代到来：Eightfold、Paradox、Radancy等密集发布
title.en: Multi-Agent AI for Talent Acquisition Arrives: Eightfold, Paradox, Maki, Radancy and More

summary.zh: Josh Bersin指出，招聘技术正从单点AI工具跃迁到多智能体协同系统，多家头部厂商同期推出可自主完成筛选、沟通、安排面试的AI代理。这标志着招聘运营模式的结构性转变，HR需重新设计人机协作流程与监督机制。
summary.en: Josh Bersin notes that recruiting tech is leaping from single-point AI tools to multi-agent collaborative systems, with several leading vendors simultaneously launching AI agents that autonomously screen, communicate and schedule interviews. This marks a structural shift in recruiting operations, requiring HR to redesign human-machine workflows and oversight.

title.zh: MIT研究：AI在招聘中比人类更容易形成偏见
title.en: MIT: AI Is More Likely Than Humans to Form Biases When Hiring

summary.zh: MIT科技评论发布研究，发现AI招聘系统在缺乏约束时比人类招聘者更容易固化和放大偏见。研究呼吁企业在部署AI招聘工具前建立严格的偏见测试与持续审计机制，而非默认AI比人更客观。
summary.en: MIT Technology Review published research finding that, without constraints, AI hiring systems are more prone to entrench and amplify bias than human recruiters. The study urges firms to establish rigorous bias testing and continuous auditing before deploying AI hiring tools, rather than assuming AI is more objective than people.

title.zh: 纽约市最终确定2026版《带薪安全与病假法》更新规则
title.en: NYC Finalizes Rules Updating the Earned Safe and Sick Time Act for 2026

summary.zh: 纽约市已敲定对《带薪安全与病假法》的更新规则，明确了雇主在假期累积、使用和记录方面的合规要求。HR团队需及时更新员工手册、假期政策与工资系统，避免因细则变化引发合规风险。
summary.en: New York City has finalized updated rules for its Earned Safe and Sick Time Act, clarifying employer compliance requirements around accrual, usage and recordkeeping. HR teams must promptly update handbooks, leave policies and payroll systems to avoid compliance risk from the rule changes.

content.zh: AI决策的可解释性是合规底线。当AI参与裁员、晋升或招聘等重大人事决定时，企业必须能够解释决策依据。原因在于：反歧视法律要求雇主证明决策基于合法业务理由，而黑箱算法无法自证清白。实践上应保留决策日志、设置人类复核节点，并对模型输出做定期偏见审计。
content.en: Explainability of AI decisions is the compliance baseline. When AI participates in major personnel decisions like layoffs, promotions or hiring, the company must be able to explain the basis. Anti-discrimination law requires employers to prove decisions rest on legitimate business reasons, and a black-box algorithm cannot vindicate itself. In practice, keep decision logs, insert human review checkpoints, and run periodic bias audits on model outputs.

content.zh: AI正在重塑入门级岗位的价值定位。当AI能承担初级重复性工作时，企业招聘应届生的逻辑从『补充产能』转向『培养长期潜力』。这意味着HR需重新设计岗位职责，让新人聚焦于AI难以替代的判断力、协作与创造性任务，并配套导师制与快速轮岗机制加速成长。
content.en: AI is reshaping the value proposition of entry-level roles. When AI can handle junior repetitive work, the logic of hiring new grads shifts from 'adding capacity' to 'cultivating long-term potential.' HR must redesign job scopes so newcomers focus on judgment, collaboration and creative tasks AI cannot easily replace, supported by mentorship and rapid rotation programs to accelerate growth.

content.zh: 多智能体招聘需要新的人机协作治理框架。当多个AI代理自主完成筛选、沟通和面试安排时，风险不再是单点错误而是级联失控。核心逻辑是为每个自主环节设定清晰的权限边界、异常升级规则和人类兜底节点，确保效率提升不以候选人体验和公平性为代价。
content.en: Multi-agent recruiting requires a new governance framework for human-machine collaboration. When multiple AI agents autonomously screen, communicate and schedule interviews, the risk is no longer a single point of failure but cascading loss of control. The core logic is to set clear authority boundaries, exception-escalation rules and human fallback checkpoints for each autonomous step, ensuring efficiency gains don't come at the cost of candidate experience and fairness.

content.zh: 盘点本组织内所有涉及AI的人事决策场景：第一步列出招聘、晋升、绩效、裁员中使用AI或算法评分的环节；第二步核查每个环节是否保留可解释的决策记录；第三步为高风险环节（如裁员）立即补设人类复核节点。
content.en: Inventory all AI-involved personnel decision scenarios in your org: first, list where AI or algorithmic scoring is used across hiring, promotion, performance and layoffs; second, verify each keeps an explainable decision record; third, immediately add human review checkpoints for high-risk steps like layoffs.

content.zh: 为AI招聘工具设计偏见测试清单：选取过去三个月的招聘数据，按性别、年龄、族裔等维度对比AI筛选通过率是否存在显著差异；发现异常时暂停该工具并与供应商核对模型逻辑。
content.en: Design a bias-testing checklist for AI recruiting tools: take the last three months of hiring data, compare AI pass-through rates across gender, age and ethnicity dimensions for significant disparities; if anomalies appear, pause the tool and review the model logic with the vendor.

content.zh: 更新入门级岗位的能力画像：与业务部门访谈，明确AI已能承担哪些初级任务；据此改写至少一个应届生岗位的JD，突出判断力与协作等人类核心能力，并配套一份90天成长路径。
content.en: Update the competency profile for entry-level roles: interview business units to clarify which junior tasks AI can now handle; rewrite at least one new-grad job description accordingly, emphasizing human core skills like judgment and collaboration, paired with a 90-day growth path.
